title: QA Automation Engineer
description: We are hiring a QA Automation Engineer to build and maintain end-to-end regression suites for a payroll platform. You will work closely with developers and product managers, design automated coverage for web workflows, and improve CI reliability. Strong experience with Selenium, Playwright, TypeScript, API testing, and Git is preferred. Hybrid in Vancouver.

title: Senior SDET
description: Join HarborStack as a Senior SDET focused on Cypress, Playwright, API testing, contract testing, CI/CD, flaky test reduction, and release confidence across customer-facing SaaS products. Remote within Canada.

title: Quality Assurance Analyst
description: Entry-level QA Analyst role supporting manual testing, bug reporting, regression testing, test case management, smoke checks, and close collaboration with developers and product teams. Experience with Jira and basic API testing is a plus.

title: QA Lead
description: Lead a growing QA function across web and API products. Own test strategy, automation standards, mentoring, CI pipelines, Selenium and Playwright coverage, release quality, and cross-functional coordination.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Build modern product experiences using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and component-driven frontend architecture. Collaborate with product and design to ship performant customer-facing interfaces.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Work across Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, REST APIs, and modern SaaS workflows. Ideal candidates are comfortable owning features end-to-end and writing maintainable TypeScript.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design backend services with Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, message queues, caching, and cloud deployment patterns. Strong API design and production debugging experience required.

title: Junior Web Developer
description: Support web builds and maintenance across HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, accessibility fixes, CMS updates, and bug resolution. Great fit for an early-career developer building commercial experience.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Own CI/CD, infrastructure as code, observability, cloud environments, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and production deployment workflows. Strong Linux and GitOps fundamentals expected.

title: Platform Engineer
description: Build internal platform capabilities using Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, service reliability practices, incident response, observability tooling, and deployment automation for engineering teams.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Improve reliability and incident response for distributed systems. Work on monitoring, alerting, automation, AWS infrastructure, Linux systems, SLIs/SLOs, and operational tooling.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: Support SaaS customers by troubleshooting API issues, logs, authentication, integrations, and product workflows. Great communication, SQL familiarity, and debugging instincts required.

title: Application Support Analyst
description: Handle production support, ticket triage, incident investigation, SQL checks, user issue reproduction, and coordination with engineering teams for an internal finance platform.

title: Customer Support Engineer
description: Bridge support and engineering for enterprise customers. Troubleshoot integrations, read logs, reproduce defects, work with APIs, and improve internal knowledge base and escalation quality.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze product and operational data using SQL, Python, dashboards, experimentation support, and stakeholder reporting. Experience with BI tools and data storytelling is important.

title: Analytics Engineer
description: Own analytics models, transformation pipelines, dbt workflows, warehouse documentation, stakeholder enablement, and trusted metrics across growth and product analytics.

title: Technical Product Manager
description: Lead product planning for technical workflow tools. Define requirements, partner with design and engineering, prioritize backlog, validate outcomes, and communicate roadmap tradeoffs.

title: Technical Operations Specialist
description: Support technical operations across SaaS workflows, ticket systems, process automation, documentation, stakeholder coordination, and tooling reliability. SQL and scripting are a plus.

title: Security Engineer
description: Support secure application delivery with cloud security, IAM, vulnerability remediation, secure SDLC, automation, and cross-functional incident response. Background with AWS and compliance is valuable.

title: Game Producer
description: Own game production workflows across milestones, sprint planning, Jira tracking, team coordination, stakeholder communication, risk management, delivery schedules, and cross-discipline execution. Ideal for candidates with experience as producer, game producer, development producer, or project producer.

title: Development Producer
description: Lead development production across multi-team game initiatives. Coordinate engineering, art, design, and narrative. Strong Jira, sprint operations, roadmap alignment, and release readiness required. Relevant titles include development producer, senior producer, delivery producer, and project lead.

title: Associate Producer
description: Support sprint planning, Jira hygiene, meeting facilitation, task follow-up, milestone coordination, and team communications. Great entry path for associate producer, production coordinator, junior producer, or project coordinator candidates.

title: Product Owner
description: Own backlog health, user story definition, acceptance criteria, sprint priorities, stakeholder feedback, and delivery coordination with engineering and QA. Strong fit for product owner, agile product owner, scrum product owner, or delivery owner profiles.

title: Technical Product Owner
description: Drive roadmap execution for technical platform features. Translate requirements into user stories, manage backlog priorities, coordinate with developers and QA, and define acceptance criteria. Related titles include technical product owner, platform product owner, and product delivery lead.

title: Agile Product Owner
description: Support agile product delivery with strong backlog ownership, sprint planning, stakeholder alignment, acceptance criteria, roadmap communication, and iterative release planning. Relevant aliases include product owner, scrum PO, agile PO, and feature owner.

title: Narrative Writer
description: Write and iterate on in-game narrative, dialogue, quest text, character voice, lore, branching story content, and collaboration with design and production. Ideal for narrative writer, game writer, interactive writer, or story writer backgrounds.

title: Game Writer
description: Develop game scripts, branching dialogue, mission text, narrative systems support, lore bibles, and collaboration with creative direction. Strong fit for game writer, narrative designer with writing emphasis, interactive writer, or script writer roles.

title: Narrative Designer
description: Shape story implementation across quest structure, dialogue systems, narrative pacing, worldbuilding, and collaboration with game design. Suitable for narrative designer, narrative writer, content designer, quest writer, or story designer profiles.
